programmes.show_description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
3/21. Oona takes Isabelle on a midnight journey to see the phytoplankton sea lights! Tha Oona a' toirt Iseabail air cuairt meadhan-oidhch' gus na Solais Mara luibh-phlancton fhaicinn.
4/21. A mysterious visitor has been sleeping in everyone's dens. Tha neach-tadhail dìomhair air a bhith a' cadal ann an sadhbhaidh gach neach.
6/40. Tha Boban trang a' sgioblachadh - ach dè tha Fuigheag ris? Boban is busy tidying today, but what's Fuigheag up to?
1/10. Linda visits Meaban and Moo with a challenge. Today, they must find items to keep them warm.
36/52. Tha AH-AH farmadach an-diugh oir tha e den bheachd nach eil ùine aig MacÌomhair air a shon. AH-AH is jealous today as he thinks MacÌomhair has no time for him.
15/52. When Losgann is lost in the park, Posy is upset. Pip wants to be helpful.  He creates a game and together with Zac, Jamila and Francaidh, they go to look for Losgann.
16/52. Tha Pip is Posy a' lorg balùn 's tha iad a' toirt ainm dha - Rob am Balùn. Pip and Posy find a balloon and they give him a name - Rob the Balloon.
34/80. Eilidh NicCarmaig a' leughadh Daoine Beaga, Aislingean Mòra: Ella Fitzgerald. Eilidh Cormack reads Daoine Beaga, Aislingean Mòra: Ella Fitzgerald.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 42/52. Abair gu bheil Bleideag iarratach 's Stella na manaidsear-sgìreil oirr'. Bleideag is very demanding when Stella becomes her community manager.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 43/52. Tha oidhche spà dol a bhith ann. A spa night is going to take place.
...Gumbalan/Bottersnikes and Gumbles. 43/52. Tha Samaidh Whamaidh air ais. Samaidh Whamaidh is back.
12/13. Tha Stoirm Catatumbo a' leudachadh gu luath - ach dè tha ga adhbharachadh? The Catatumbo Storm is expanding rapidly, but what is causing it?
1/4. Sweeny reflects on the past year, discussing the impact of the pandemic on his life as a crofter in North Lewis.
12/13. We meet Gaelic learner Colin Scott Mackenzie who lives on the Isle of Lewis, and a poorly Calum Maclean tries out the healing properties of an ancient clootie well.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
4/6. Peter starts planting on the croft and goes to look at some unique sheep. Tha Pàdruig a' cur buntàta agus a' dol a shealltainn air caoraich gu math sònraichte.
Anna Macleod chairs a special debate ahead of the Scottish elections in May.
Cuirm Ruairidh Gray aig Na Barrowlands. Le Megan NicGill-Fhaolain. Ruairidh Gray in concert at The Barrowlands. Presented by Megan MacLellan.

programmes.show_name: Miorbhail na Monach - Secrets in the Peat
programmes.show_description: 1/3. In Harris, we go in search of the stags which roam the peaty uplands.

programmes.show_name: Seòid a' Chidsin - The Kitchen Coves
programmes.show_description: 2/6. The lads cook using their tandoor oven to make tandoori chicken and skewered lamb chops, along with naan and haddock tikka.

...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 33/52. Abney, Teal and Neep make mysterious noises on a misty day. They try to get Bop to join in the game, but it's not so mysterious down by the lake.
17/26. Tha caraidean coibhneil ri chèile nuair a tha 'ad tinn. Friends are kind to one another when they are poorly.
4/26. Ernest is grumbling. His bees are producing bitter, inedible honey. However, Célestine is delighted as Mrs Tulip's flowers have never been so lovely!
35/80. Gilleasbaig Fearghasdan a' leughadh Fear Coimhid nan Sgòthan. Gilleasbaig Ferguson reads Fear Coimhid nan Sgòthan.
1/12. The CBBC ALBA presenters love a good challenge but who will emerge victorious as Mhairi joins them?
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 51/52. Lil Sue turns into a stomping, green eyed monster.
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 52/52. According to Gareth the starfish, every pancake has two sides, happy and grumpy.
1/8. Astronaut Emily shares some interesting facts about the sun. Tha rudan inntinneach aig an Speuradair Emily ri innse dhuinn mun ghrèin.
11/13. Tha Hilda is am Fear Fiodh a' tighinn tarsainn air taigh draoidheil sa choille an-diugh. Hilda and the Woodman encounter a magical house in the woods today.
5/6. Cùrsaichean ann an Lodainn an Ear, is coidse le comhairle. The 15th Redan hole at North Berwick and golf tips from Keil Beveridge.
12/13. Learner Hamish Hepburn from Carrbridge chats to Joy in the studio and Calum Maclean indulges his sweet tooth as he learns about beekeeping in Easter Ross.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
7/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.
Revealing the variety and importance of Jurassic dinosaur finds on Skye. Beairteas làraich chudromach dìneasar na linne Jurassic san Eilean Sgitheanaich.
...Ire/Gaming - The Next Level. 5/10. Am pàirt a th' aig Alba ann an gnìomhachas nan geamannan. Scotland's part in the games industry.
5/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.
3/20. The world of Fraochy Bay, a miniature metropolis just off the map. Poet-in-residence Torquil Farquhar de Smith tries to capture the bay in verse.
2/9. Iain MacKinnon presents a mix of hymns, psalms and readings from Coats in Paisley.
